questions.enonce: What is the primary role of a museum ?
options: To preserve and display objects of artistic, cultural, or scientific importance
To be a meeting place for spies

questions.enonce: Repatriation is the return of art or artifacts to their country of origin.
A world-famous museum in London that holds many contested artifacts is the {{1}} Museum.

pairs.right: An object made by a human being, typically of historical interest
A person in charge of a museum collection
A public display of works of art

questions.enonce: Why is the preservation of heritage sometimes a conflict of power ?
options: Because it involves questions of ownership, identity, and national pride
